title: Urgent Opening Hotel Manager at Scootsy Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Hotel Manager at Scootsy Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Scootsy Holdings Services is actively seeking a talented and motivated Hotel Manager to join our dynamic team in Jaipur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Scootsy Holdings Services:
Scootsy Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in GDS Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Scootsy Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
